title: Add Author Section to README
description: Update the project's README.md file to include an 'Author' section with the relevant author information.
details: Open the README.md file in the project root. Add a clearly labeled 'Author' section near the end (or in a logical place if sections are already present). Include the author's name and, if appropriate, contact information or links (e.g., GitHub profile, email). Ensure the formatting matches the rest of the README and adheres to Markdown best practices.
test_strategy: Review the updated README.md file in a Markdown previewer to ensure the 'Author' section appears correctly, is free of typos, and matches the project's formatting style. Optionally, have another team member review for accuracy and clarity.
